description_long: This is a modern, slim laptop with a detachable keyboard and a touchscreen display, accompanied by a stylus pen. The device features a dark matte finish, with a large touchpad centered below the keyboard and a kickstand at the back for support. The screen displays the Windows 10 operating system, with visible application windows and a start menu. The keyboard is compact, lacking a numeric keypad, and the keys are flat and closely spaced. The stylus is positioned between the keyboard and the screen, suggesting compatibility with pen input. The rear of the device is plain, with no visible branding or stickers, and the overall design is minimalist and professional.
description: A sleek, dark-colored laptop with a detachable keyboard, touchscreen, and stylus, featuring a kickstand and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the touchscreen display with Windows 10 interface, keyboard, touchpad, and stylus resting between the screen and keyboard.
description_view_1: Angled side view highlighting the kickstand, the stylus positioned upright, and the thin profile of the device.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the extended kickstand and the plain, unbranded back cover.
description_view_3: Side view emphasizing the open kickstand, the thinness of the device, and the stylus floating above the keyboard.
attribute_screen_state: Screen is open and turned on, displaying the Windows 10 desktop and application windows.
attribute_keyboard_layout: QWERTY layout, no numeric keypad, includes function row and standard keys.
